gpu: Intel Open Source Technology Center Mesa DRI Intel(R) Sandybridge Mobile
notes: Tested using free Demo version. Worked without any tweaks, but I have Wine D3D11 enabled because my hardware has no Vulkan support.
title: Flowers -Le volume sur printemps-

notes: So running this Visual Novel was flawlessly using proton, all text was where it should be all images are shown properly. Install and launch work fine. Though be said the game has a "Anti-Piracy-Measure" which is triggered when using proton (even though I legally own a version of the game). Its easy to circumvent it though. After the intro the game will hang in an white screen. You can "fix" it if you can get a save right after the intro and load that save. After that the game runs perfectly. So overall Gold for me since you will still need a save to come through the intro scene.
title: Flowers -Le volume sur printemps-
